---
title: "Week 11"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (4/27)
:::

**Topics**

-   Conditional expectation (given an event)

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_29.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   [Conditional expectation (given event) practice problems](class/CA_29.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (4/29)
:::

**Topics**

-   Conditional expectation (given a random variable)

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_30.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   [Conditional expectation (given RV) practice problems](class/CA_30.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (5/01)
:::

No in-person class today!!

**Topics**

-   Conditional variance

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   Please watch this video replacing lecture!!
